info.title: FlowLite.Diag
info.description: FlowLite.Diag is a .NET CLI tool that scans your project for FlowTransitionBuilder declarations and generates visual FSM diagrams in Mermaid or DOT format. Features: - parses C# source files for **FlowTransitionBuilder** usage, - generates state diagrams for each builder,- supports Mermaid.js and Graphviz DOT output formats, - designed to aid in debugging, documentation, and understanding workflows

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Generates a diagnostic graph for FlowLite-based finite state machines (FSM).
